seo.title: Potato Wedges - with paprika - Marinda Kook

html:
This isn't really a recipe. More of a “throw-it-together-and-enjoy”.

YOU'LL NEED:

  • 5 potatoes
  • 15 ml coarse salt
  • 20 ml paprika
  • pepper
  • 2 sprigs rosemary
  • 100 ml olive oil

NOW:

  1. wash your potatoes – I scrub them with a kitchen sponge, but keep the skins on
  2. cut the potato lengthwise and then once more
  3. pack into an oven dish
  4. sprinkle salt, pepper and paprika over
  5. lay the rosemary sprigs on top
  6. drizzle with olive oil
  7. bake uncovered in the oven for about 45 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius – turn it halfway

Enjoy the dish with fish or on its own with a dipping sauce.
